message:
fix(quality): join file paths with repo root in UBS client

Fix UbsClient::get_uncommitted_changes() to properly construct
absolute file paths by joining git output with repo_root.

Previously, file paths from 'git diff --name-only' were used as-is,
which failed when the working directory differed from the repo root.
Now paths are correctly resolved:
  repo_root.join(relative_path)

This ensures the UBS (Uncommitted Blame Scoring) client works
correctly regardless of the current working directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
